title: Rautavaara — the Composer as Gardener
description: "I have often compared composing to gardening." Rautavaara's organic-growth poetics, and how it converges on Michelangelo's claim that the figure is already in the stone.

title: Subblock Feature Demo
description: Demonstrating the new three-column code subblock feature for better structural explanation.

title: Session 03: TodoWrite - The Power of Planning
Session 04: Subagents & Task Isolation
description: "Break big tasks down; each subtask gets a clean context" -- subagents use independent messages[], keeping the main conversation clean.

title: Session 06: Context Compaction
description: "Context will fill up; you need a way to make room" -- three-layer compression strategy for infinite sessions.

title: Session 05: Skill Loading & Knowledge Management
description: "Load knowledge when you need it, not upfront" -- inject via tool_result, not the system prompt.
